claims.text: Subject 16 (female, age 23 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on Allele 1 paired with combined pseudodeficiency alleles c.1726G>A(p.Gly576Ser)/c.2065G>A(p.Glu689Lys) on Allele 2; GAA 2.3, Hex4 5.0, CK 108, AST 103, ALT 40; classified as Carrier.

claims.text: Subject 38 (male, age 21 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on Allele 1 paired with c.2065G>A (p.Glu689Lys) on Allele 2; GAA 3.2, Hex4 3.3, CK 69, AST 93, ALT 32; classified as Carrier.

Subject 7 (female, age 17 days at initial consult) carries c.-32-13T>G on Allele 1 and a garbled Allele 2 entry that appears to include c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu); EKG showed hypertrophy, echo showed hypertrophy; classified as Late Onset.
